recommendations.title: Avalanche Sharks
recommendations.genres: Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: A snow avalanche awakens humungous, prehistoric sharks that proceed to chomp on bikini clad co-eds.

recommendations.title: Jurassic World
recommendations.overview: Twenty-two years after the events of Jurassic Park, Isla Nublar now features a fully functioning dinosaur theme park, Jurassic World, as originally envisioned by John Hammond.

recommendations.title: On Deadly Ground
recommendations.overview: Forrest Taft is an environmental agent who works for the Aegis Oil Company in Alaska. Aegis Oil's corrupt CEO is the kind of person who doesn't care whether or not oil spills into the ocean or onto the land—just as long as it's making money for him.

recommendations.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Three years after Jurassic World was destroyed, Isla Nublar now sits abandoned. When the island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: The River of Souls
recommendations.overview: A group of Soul Hunters come to Babylon 5 demanding the return of something that was stolen from them.

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Drama, Romance, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The first film adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's classic novel about a land where prehistoric creatures still roam.

recommendations.title: Megaboa
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: On a trip to Colombia, a group of college students encounter a fifty-foot boa constrictor, hungry for blood.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Hungerford
recommendations.overview: The lives of a group of teenagers are turned upside down when their town is taken over by sinister forces.

recommendations.title: Time Trap
recommendations.overview: A group of students become trapped inside a mysterious cave where they discover time passes differently underground than on the surface.
